Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}If I put in my greatest effort, I will achieve the greatest outcome![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}One needle, one soul! This is my subete—my everything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Huh... That cheap material has been completely transformed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I could never have done this on my own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Without you, I would probably be back home already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}And thanks to all your help, the kimono is almost finished! I feel so blessed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 13 15 5 112}Many thanks—katajikenai! Your kind words help me forget my aches and pains![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}My home country... With my aunt gone, there is nothing there for me now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I just want to hurry and put an end to this so that I may live and die in Nihon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe's pretty fired up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}If I could, I'd treat you to a feast of Japanese snacks! But sadly, my wallet is empty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}There's something I need to tell you, {f 4 2}-dono.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I have gotten to know many people since coming to Nihon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}But you have been the most subarashii person of them all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I would tell her about what a wonderful friend you have been to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can tell that Bebe really trusts me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}And nooow! We put the final touches on this kimono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Sure, I am so tired I may be hallucinating a little bit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}But this is the last part... I can't give up now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent the day helping Bebe,[n]then went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
